title: EatWise
description: EatWise is a mobile application aimed at promoting healthier eating habits in Cameroon. It offers food and label scanning, personalized meal plans, consultations with dietitians, and a community platform for sharing recipes. The app addresses local dietary challenges and empowers users to achieve their health goals through personalized support.

title: VERO
description: VERO is a full-stack AI research workspace for ingesting documents, URLs, and GitHub repositories, then answering with hybrid retrieval, reranking, and grounded citations inside project-scoped chat sessions.

title: PlumVision
description: PlumVision is a real-time vision system developed during the JCIA Hackathon. It delivers fast and reliable plum classification with live session analytics, perfect for farmers and medium-to-large-scale businesses. Designed for real-world deployment, PlumVision emphasizes real-time feedback, modular architecture, and operational efficiency.

title: Insect Splash
description: Insect Splash is an engaging game using Computer Vision and hand-tracking to create an interactive experience where players aim to eliminate insects on the screen within a time limit. It showcases the playful potential of real-time computer vision.

title: FoodHub
description: FoodHub is a platform designed to minimize food waste and combat hunger by enabling individuals to share their surplus food at an affordable cost. The platform integrates secure facial recognition for payment authentication, promoting resourcefulness and community impact.

title: Spoof Detector
description: The Spoof Detector is a deep learning model capable of distinguishing between real and fake faces, enhancing facial recognition system security. Trained on diverse datasets for bias mitigation, it is accessible via a RESTful API for easy integration.

title: Mathematical Morphology
description: Implemented Mathematical Morphology concepts from scratch using numpy and matplotlib. Explored techniques such as erosion, dilation, and feature extraction with a focus on optimization and understanding of digital image processing.
